description.value:
Snowbound prayer-lines memorized by wanderers — Hvitvidde wanderers memorize prayers against cold that quiet the mind as much as the body; when transcribed into an implement, the prayer extends its hush outward, muffling movement briefly.

Effect: Once per encounter, you gain cold immunity 5 until the end of the encounter. Additionally, you can briefly mute your footsteps until the end of your next turn; during this time your movement makes no sound, regardless of surface (Director adjudicates).

Rules: Damage Immunity; Encounter.

project.prerequisites: An implement of at least quality craft; a prayer-strip from a Hvitvidde wanderer, written in breath-frost on birch bark
